entry.title: UltrafastSecp256k1 v3.14.0
entry.summary: Joining the Discord channel is recommended for in-depth discussions on various topics of interest. The sender has compiled numerous benchmarks across different devices and platforms, which are accessible through their Git repository. Additionally, they highlight ongoing improvements that have yet to be released, promising an update within the next two days at the latest. These updates are part of a self-conducted code audit aimed at examining and testing all edge cases to ensure thorough evaluation and refinement of their work. This effort underscores a commitment to quality and continuous improvement in their projects.
